simple_types.name: Align_Style
simple_types.code: type Align_Style is (ALIGN_DEFAULT, ALIGN_LEFT, ALIGN_RIGHT, ALIGN_CENTER);

simple_types.name: Node_Kind
simple_types.code:
type Node_Kind is (N_NONE,
                   N_LINE_BREAK,
                   N_HORIZONTAL_RULE,
                   N_TOC_DISPLAY,
                   N_PARAGRAPH,
                   N_END_DEFINITION,
                   N_TOC_ENTRY,
                   N_LIST_ITEM,
,
,
,
                   …,
                   N_IMAGE);

array_types.name: Column_Array_Style
array_types.code: type Column_Array_Style is array (Positive range <>) of Column_Style;

record_types.name: Column_Style
Node_Type

access_types.name: Node_List_Access
access_types.code: type Node_List_Access is access all Node_List;

access_types.name: Node_Type_Access
access_types.code: type Node_Type_Access is access all Node_Type;

subtypes.name: Row_Kind
subtypes.code: subtype Row_Kind is Node_Kind range N_ROW_HEADER .. N_ROW_FOOTER;

subtypes.name: Simple_Node_Kind
subtypes.code: subtype Simple_Node_Kind is Node_Kind range N_NONE .. N_END_DEFINITION;

subprograms.code:
procedure Append (Into : in out Node_List;
                  Node : in Node_Type_Access)

subprograms.code:
procedure Append (Into : in Node_Type_Access;
                  Node : in Node_Type_Access)

subprograms.name: Find_List
subprograms.code: function Find_List (From : in Node_Type) return Node_Type_Access

subprograms.name: Find_Row
subprograms.code: function Find_Row (From : in Node_Type) return Node_Type_Access

subprograms.code: function Find_Table (From : in Node_Type) return Node_Type_Access
